steps.title: Add steel bead to 1
steps.instruction: Add steel bead to 1.5 ml tube

steps.title: Add 800 µL CD1 to tube
steps.instruction: Add 800 µL CD1 to tube

steps.title: Weigh tube (with bead and solution)
steps.instruction: Weigh tube (with bead and solution)

steps.title: Dissect approximately 25 mg (3 mm...
steps.instruction: Dissect approximately 25 mg (3 mm 3 ) piece of tissue Fragment tissue with scalpel Add tissue to tube (with bead and solution)

steps.title: Weigh tube and calculate net tissue weight
steps.instruction: Weigh tube and calculate net tissue weight.

steps.title: Process tubes on TissueLyzer II, 2...
steps.instruction: Process tubes on TissueLyzer II, 2 min at 30 Hz Rotate block 180º and repeat

steps.title: Centrifuge tubes briefly to collapse foam
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tubes briefly to collapse foam

steps.title: Spin PowerBead Pro plate to ensure...
steps.instruction: Spin PowerBead Pro plate to ensure beads are settled at the bottom

steps.title: Add contents of each specimen tube...
steps.instruction: Add contents of each specimen tube (except steel bead) to a PowerBead plate well

steps.title: Add 5 µL of 20 mg/ml...
steps.instruction: Add 5 µL of 20 mg/ml proteinase K to each well

steps.title: Seal plate with film Vortex briefly to mix
steps.instruction: Seal plate with film Vortex briefly to mix

steps.title: Incubate plate at 65º C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate plate at 65º C for 60 min or until tissue is mostly digested

steps.title: Process plate on TissueLyser II, 5...
steps.instruction: Process plate on TissueLyser II, 5 min at 25 Hz Rotate plate 180º and repeat

steps.title: Centrifuge plate at 3000 x g for 7
steps.instruction: Centrifuge plate at 3000 x g for 7.5 min

steps.title: Transfer approximately 350 µL supernatant from...
steps.instruction: Transfer approximately 350 µL supernatant from each well to fresh S-block using well-vator

steps.title: add 300 µL of solution CD2...
steps.instruction: add 300 µL of solution CD2 to each well and mix thoroughly by pipetting

steps.title: Seal the plate with film Centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Seal the plate with film Centrifuge at 3000 x g for 7.5 min at room temperature

steps.title: Avoiding the pellet, transfer 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Avoiding the pellet, transfer 500 µL of supernatant to fresh S-block using well-vator

steps.title: Follow DNeasy 96 PowerSoil Pro Protocol...
steps.instruction: Follow DNeasy 96 PowerSoil Pro Protocol for QIAcube HT (page 17 onward) Elute in maximum volume (120 µL) Incude vacuum performance check

steps.title: Seal plate and freeze at -20ºC
steps.instruction: Seal plate and freeze at -20ºC
